name: aws
context: Amazon Web Services cloud ecosystem — compute, storage, networking, AI, and infrastructure
info: Complete AWS skill tree covering core services: S3 for object storage, Lambda for serverless compute, IAM for identity management, EC2 for virtual machines, DynamoDB for NoSQL, and more. Skills handle authentication via AWS SDK credentials, support all regions, and include Terraform/CDK alternatives where applicable.
author: dojo-community
